basic_details.job_title: HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission
basic_details.short_information: H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (HPSCDRC) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent from a University recognized by the Government of Himachal Pradesh., English Shorthand speed: 100 words per minute (W.P.M.), English Typing Speed: 40 words per minute (W.P.M.), Adequate knowledge of word processing on computer.
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent from a University recognized by the Government of Himachal Pradesh. English Shorthand speed: 100 words per minute (W.P.M.). English Typing Speed: 40 words per minute (W.P.M.). Adequate knowledge of word processing on computer.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://hpconsumercommission.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) post is 22nd May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for the Senior Scale Stenographer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) post will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 38,500 to Rs. 1,22,700 per month, as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent from a recognized university, along with a shorthand speed of 100 WPM and a typing speed of 40 WPM in English, and adequate computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Scale Stenographer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) post announced in this recruitment drive by HPSCDRC.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is HP/CPC/SSS/2026 (1).

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of HPSCDRC?
faq.answer: The official website of the H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission is http://hpconsumercommission.nic.in, where candidates can find more information and download the application form.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for the Senior Scale Stenographer post?
faq.answer: The application fee for the Senior Scale Stenographer post is Rs. 500/- for all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Deputation.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidate be posted?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be posted in Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, at the H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission.
